sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁמן

Transliteration: shemen

Phonetic: sheh'-men

BDB Definition:

  1. fat, oil
    1. fat, fatness
    2. oil, olive oil
      1. as staple, medicament or unguent
      2. for anointing
    3. fat (of fruitful land, valleys) (metaphorically)

Origin: from H8080

TWOT entry: 2410c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
